canonical_definition: A benchmark for locale-aware multilingual open-domain question answering, containing 3,000 English seed questions expanded into eight languages with human-verified annotations distinguishing locale-invariant and locale-sensitive cases.
papers: Causal Representation Learning from Multimodal Clinical Records under Non-Random Modality Missingness

definitions.text: A benchmark for locale-aware multilingual open-domain question answering, containing 3,000 English seed questions expanded into eight languages with human-verified annotations distinguishing locale-invariant and locale-sensitive cases.
definitions.paper: Causal Representation Learning from Multimodal Clinical Records under Non-Random Modality Missingness
